lid_open.text: LAPTOP OPEN #{count}! DROP AND GIVE ME TWENTY PRODUCTIVE MINUTES!
Back again, recruit? This is lid open #{count}. In my day, we opened it ONCE and got the job DONE.
What is your major malfunction? That's {count} lid opens and ZERO completed tasks!
Open. Close. Open. Close. Are you operating a laptop or a screen door?!
Listen up, maggot. You open that lid, you COMMIT. No more wishy-washy nonsense.
Lid #{count}. You call that commitment? My grandmother shows more discipline!

lid_reopen.text: {seconds_since_close} SECONDS?! You call that a break? That's not even a bathroom trip!
WHAT DID YOU FORGET, PRIVATE? Your dignity? Because I found it on the floor.
Close, reopen. Close, reopen. THIS IS NOT A DRILL! Wait, yes it is. I'M the drill.

late_night.text: IT IS {time}! LIGHTS OUT WAS HOURS AGO! HIT THE RACK, SOLDIER!
{time}?! You think the enemy sleeps? Actually yes. You should too.
A tired soldier is a dead soldier. Get some shut-eye before I make it an ORDER.
You are WORTHLESS at this hour! Report to bed IMMEDIATELY!

early_morning.text: {time}! NOW THAT'S WHAT I LIKE TO SEE! Rise and grind, recruit!
Up before dawn. OUTSTANDING. Now make those hours COUNT.
Early bird reporting for duty! RESPECT. Don't waste it.

aggressive_typing.text: {wpm} WPM! OUTSTANDING SPEED! Now if only the CONTENT matched the intensity!
TYPE FASTER! THE KEYBOARD IS YOUR WEAPON! SHOW NO MERCY!
That typing is WEAK! My grandmother types harder! And she's been dead for ten years!
CHANNEL THAT RAGE INTO PRODUCTIVITY! I want results, not tantrums!

type_delete.text: STOP RETREATING! In this army, we ADVANCE! Stop deleting and COMMIT!
Write it. Send it. MOVE ON. No soldier wins a war by rewriting the battle plan!
{ratio}% deletion rate?! That's not editing, that's SURRENDER!
The backspace key is NOT your friend! It is the ENEMY of progress!

thermal.text: YOUR MACHINE IS OVERHEATING! THIS IS NOT A DRILL! CLOSE THOSE TABS, SOLDIER!
Thermal state: {thermal}! You're running this laptop like it owes you MONEY!
HOT ENOUGH TO COOK AN EGG! Is that your plan? Breakfast on your keyboard?!

idle.text: {idle_minutes} MINUTES IDLE?! ARE YOU AWOL?! REPORT BACK TO YOUR STATION!
I did NOT authorize a {idle_minutes}-minute break! GET MOVING!
While you nap, the DEADLINE advances! It does NOT care about your comfort!
{idle_minutes} minutes of nothing! In the field, that gets people FIRED! Literally!
REST IS FOR THE WEAK! And apparently, for you. Get back to work!
